vocab.example: After weeks of talks, we finally closed the deal with the client.
vocab.example_vi: Sau nhiều tuần đàm phán, cuối cùng bọn mình đã chốt được thương vụ với khách hàng.

vocab.example: We had a verbal agreement, but I still needed the signed paperwork.
vocab.example_vi: Bọn mình đã có thoả thuận miệng, nhưng mình vẫn cần giấy tờ đã ký.

vocab.example: Let's finalize the details before we send the paperwork for signature.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy hoàn tất chi tiết trước khi gửi giấy tờ để ký.

vocab.example: Once you send the purchase order, we can start processing your request.
vocab.example_vi: Khi bạn gửi đơn đặt hàng, bọn mình có thể bắt đầu xử lý yêu cầu của bạn.

vocab.example: Thank you for your commitment to working with us long-term.
vocab.example_vi: Cảm ơn sự cam kết hợp tác lâu dài của anh/chị với bên em.

vocab.example: A small extra discount helped seal the deal with the customer.
vocab.example_vi: Một khoản giảm giá nhỏ thêm vào đã giúp chốt hạ thương vụ với khách hàng.

vocab.example: Before signing, let's make sure both sides are on the same page.
vocab.example_vi: Trước khi ký, hãy đảm bảo cả hai bên đều thống nhất quan điểm.

vocab.example: We just need your official signature to move forward with the order.
vocab.example_vi: Bọn mình chỉ cần chữ ký chính thức của anh/chị để tiến hành đơn hàng.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Hi Minh, thanks for taking the time to meet again today.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Of course, Hoa. We've reviewed your proposal and we're impressed.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: That's great to hear! Are we ready to close the deal today?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Almost. We just want to confirm the delivery timeline first.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Sure, delivery will take three weeks after we receive your purchase order.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Perfect. I think we're on the same page on everything else.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Wonderful. Can I get your commitment to move forward this week?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Yes, we're ready. Let's finalize the paperwork and get it signed.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: I'll send the final documents today. We just need your official signature.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: I'll review it with my manager and send it back tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Sounds good. It's been a pleasure working with you on this.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Likewise, Hoa. Looking forward to a long partnership.

questions.q: What does Minh want to confirm before closing the deal?
What does Hoa need from Minh to move forward?
When will Minh send the signed documents back?

shadowing: We finally closed the deal after weeks of back-and-forth negotiation.
Let's finalize the details before we send the paperwork for signature.
I just need your official signature to move forward with this order.
A small discount at the end really helped seal the deal.
Make sure both sides are on the same page before signing.
